title: Bauhaus Modular World Clock
description: A configurable world clock built on Bauhaus design principles. Every parameter — palette, face shape, hand style, layout — stays within strict geometric constraints.

title: Aniemails: Communication Creatures
description: Your writing style becomes a creature. Five renderers — Tangram, Glyph, Origami, Tamagotchi, Chernoff — transform communication patterns into unique procedural SVG animals. Explore 6 contacts across 2 pipelines.

title: Origami Express
description: A 3D origami crane from the HoloLens Holographic Academy, brought to the web with Three.js. The crane unfolds and animates in a multi-layered stage environment with orbit controls.

title: Poly Floater
description: A low-poly 3D floating island scene with canyon columns, clouds, and tumbleweeds. Built with Three.js — orbit to explore, click to rotate the island. Anti-gravity desert aesthetic.

title: Polar Bauhaus World Clock
description: Concentric rotating arcs visualize time across world cities. Click the map to select a timezone — brightness shifts with day/night cycles. Originally built in Processing (2014), ported to Canvas.

title: Voice Enrollment Flow
description: A voice enrollment prototype with Microsoft Fluent Design. Preview different voice options with audio playback, select your preferred voice, and confirm — a UX pattern for AI voice selection.

title: Speech Visualizer Prototype
description: A voice-controlled conversational interface using the Web Speech API. Speak into your mic, see your words transcribed, and hear a simulated Copilot respond with synthesized speech.

title: Weather-Responsive Portfolio
description: A portfolio site that dynamically adapts its visuals to real-time weather — rain particles, lightning flashes, floating clouds, falling snow — all driven by the OpenWeather API and geolocation.
